spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 2 of 2 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Adds a control for the number of lazy videos that enter the viewport; Chrome DevTools verified both zero-scroll and all-scroll scenarios.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Adds an invalid-value fallback probe for video and audio; Chrome DevTools verified both fall back to eager while preserving the invalid attribute.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link as required.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verification exercised the expanded performance simulation, invalid-value fallback, corrected v147 links, and found no remaining critique questions.
